heading: Treatment of tax imposed at Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate
label: 6430 Treatment of tax imposed at Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6430, added , , , related to credit or refund of windfall profit taxes to certain trust beneficiaries, prior to repeal by , (c), , , 1324, applicable to crude oil removed from the premises on or after .Pub. L. 97–448, title I, § 106(a)(4)(A)96 Stat. 2388Pub. L. 100–418, title I, § 1941(b)(1)102 Stat. 1323Jan. 12, 1983Aug. 23, 1988Aug. 23, 1988

Amendments2025—Par. (4). added par. (4).Pub. L. 119–212007— reenacted section catchline without change and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “No refunds, credits, or payments shall be made under this subchapter for any tax imposed at the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate, except in the case of fuels destined for export.”Pub. L. 110–172

Effective Date of 2025 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to eligible indelibly dyed diesel fuel or kerosene removed on or after the date that is 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 119–21section 70525(c) of Pub. L. 119–21section 6206 of this titleJuly 4, 2025

Effective Date of 2007 AmendmentAmendment by effective as if included in the provisions of the Energy Policy Act of 2005, , to which such amendment relates, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 110–172Pub. L. 109–58section 6(e) of Pub. L. 110–172section 30C of this title

Effective DateSection effective , and applicable to fuel entered, removed, or sold after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2005 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 2005Sept. 30, 2005section 1362(d) of Pub. L. 109–58section 4041 of this title

Refund Authorized for Certain Taxes, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–172, § 6(d)(1)(C)121 Stat. 2480Dec. 29, 2007“Notwithstanding section 6430 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, a refund, credit, or payment may be made under subchapter B of chapter 65 of such Code for taxes imposed with respect to any liquid after , and before the date of the enactment of this Act [] under section 4041(d)(1) or 4042 of such Code at the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate to the extent that tax was imposed with respect to such liquid under section 4081 at the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate.”September 30, 2005Dec. 29, 2007

children.text: which are exempt from tax under section 4081(a) by reason of section 4082(f)(2),
which are exempt from tax under section 4041(d) by reason of the last sentence of paragraph (5) thereof,
with respect to which the rate increase under section 4081(a)(2)(B) is zero by reason of section 4082(e)(2), or
which are removed as eligible indelibly dyed diesel fuel or kerosene under section 6435.
